checks.name: external_prez_view_safety
checks.description: ExternalPrezViewActions (viewPresentation, removeSelfAccessFromPresentation) only permitted if principal in resource.viewers OR principal is owner/editor (via PrezEditActions/InternalPrezViewActions overlap)

checks.name: duplicate_presentation_safety
checks.description: duplicatePresentation only permitted if (principal.job == Job::internal AND principal in resource.viewers) OR principal == resource.owner OR principal in resource.editors

checks.name: edit_presentation_safety
checks.description: editPresentation only permitted if principal == resource.owner OR principal in resource.editors

checks.name: grant_view_presentation_safety
checks.description: grantViewAccessToPresentation only permitted if principal == resource.owner OR principal in resource.editors

checks.name: grant_edit_presentation_safety
checks.description: grantEditAccessToPresentation only permitted if (principal == resource.owner OR principal in resource.editors) AND context.target.job == Job::internal

checks.name: view_template_safety
checks.description: viewTemplate only permitted if principal in resource.viewerMarkets OR (principal.job == Job::internal AND principal in resource.viewers) OR principal == resource.owner OR principal in resource.editors OR principal in resource.editorMarkets

checks.name: duplicate_template_safety
checks.description: duplicateTemplate only permitted if principal in resource.viewerMarkets OR (principal.job == Job::internal AND principal in resource.viewers) OR principal == resource.owner OR principal in resource.editors OR principal in resource.editorMarkets

checks.name: edit_template_safety
checks.description: editTemplate only permitted if principal == resource.owner OR principal in resource.editors OR principal in resource.editorMarkets

checks.name: grant_edit_template_safety
checks.description: grantEditAccessToTemplate only permitted if (principal == resource.owner OR principal in resource.editors OR principal in resource.editorMarkets) AND NOT (context has targetUser && context.targetUser.job != Job::internal)

checks.name: grant_view_template_safety
checks.description: grantViewAccessToTemplate only permitted if principal == resource.owner OR principal in resource.editors OR principal in resource.editorMarkets

checks.name: remove_self_template_safety
checks.description: removeSelfAccessFromTemplate only permitted if (principal.job == Job::internal AND principal in resource.viewers) OR principal == resource.owner OR principal in resource.editors OR principal in resource.editorMarkets

checks.name: remove_others_template_safety
checks.description: removeOthersAccessToTemplate only permitted if principal == resource.owner OR principal in resource.editors OR principal in resource.editorMarkets

checks.name: floor_external_viewer_view
checks.description: A user in resource.viewers MUST be able to viewPresentation

checks.name: floor_owner_edit_presentation
checks.description: The owner of a presentation MUST be able to editPresentation

checks.name: floor_editor_edit_presentation
checks.description: An editor of a presentation MUST be able to editPresentation

checks.name: floor_market_viewer_viewTemplate
checks.description: A user in resource.viewerMarkets MUST be able to viewTemplate

checks.name: floor_owner_editTemplate
checks.description: The owner of a template MUST be able to editTemplate

checks.name: floor_editorMarket_editTemplate
checks.description: A user in resource.editorMarkets MUST be able to editTemplate

checks.name: liveness_viewPresentation
checks.description: viewPresentation is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_editPresentation
checks.description: editPresentation is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_viewTemplate
checks.description: viewTemplate is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_editTemplate
checks.description: editTemplate is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_grantEditPresentation
checks.description: grantEditAccessToPresentation is not trivially deny-all

checks.name: liveness_grantEditTemplate
checks.description: grantEditAccessToTemplate is not trivially deny-all

results.description: ExternalPrezViewActions (viewPresentation, removeSelfAccessFromPresentation) only permitted if principal in resource.viewers OR principal is owner/editor (via PrezEditActions/InternalPrezViewActions overlap)
duplicatePresentation only permitted if (principal.job == Job::internal AND principal in resource.viewers) OR principal == resource.owner OR principal in resource.editors
editPresentation only permitted if principal == resource.owner OR principal in resource.editors
grantViewAccessToPresentation only permitted if principal == resource.owner OR principal in resource.editors
grantEditAccessToPresentation only permitted if (principal == resource.owner OR principal in resource.editors) AND context.target.job == Job::internal

viewTemplate only permitted if principal in resource.viewerMarkets OR (principal.job == Job::internal AND principal in resource.viewers) OR principal == resource.owner OR principal in resource.editors OR principal in resource.editorMarkets

duplicateTemplate only permitted if principal in resource.viewerMarkets OR (principal.job == Job::internal AND principal in resource.viewers) OR principal == resource.owner OR principal in resource.editors OR principal in resource.editorMarkets
editTemplate only permitted if principal == resource.owner OR principal in resource.editors OR principal in resource.editorMarkets

grantEditAccessToTemplate only permitted if (principal == resource.owner OR principal in resource.editors OR principal in resource.editorMarkets) AND NOT (context has targetUser && context.targetUser.job != Job::internal)
grantViewAccessToTemplate only permitted if principal == resource.owner OR principal in resource.editors OR principal in resource.editorMarkets

removeSelfAccessFromTemplate only permitted if (principal.job == Job::internal AND principal in resource.viewers) OR principal == resource.owner OR principal in resource.editors OR principal in resource.editorMarkets
removeOthersAccessToTemplate only permitted if principal == resource.owner OR principal in resource.editors OR principal in resource.editorMarkets
A user in resource.viewers MUST be able to viewPresentation
The owner of a presentation MUST be able to editPresentation
An editor of a presentation MUST be able to editPresentation
A user in resource.viewerMarkets MUST be able to viewTemplate
The owner of a template MUST be able to editTemplate
A user in resource.editorMarkets MUST be able to editTemplate
viewPresentation is not trivially deny-all
editPresentation is not trivially deny-all
viewTemplate is not trivially deny-all
editTemplate is not trivially deny-all
grantEditAccessToPresentation is not trivially deny-all
results.counterexample: LIVENESS VIOLATION: Policy always denies this action. It must allow at least one scenario.

results.description: grantEditAccessToTemplate is not trivially deny-all
results.counterexample: LIVENESS VIOLATION: Policy always denies this action. It must allow at least one scenario.

stages.name: semantic
stages.message: One or more semantic checks failed.
